sections_cited: Section 279, 281, 282, 283 and 285 of the Companies Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI JCM NO.48/2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. Copy of publication in daily Jang (Urdu) dated 11.11.2025 and daily Dawn (English) dated 10.11.2025 flagged. 2. For Publication in Gazette as flagged 3. For Statement dated 13.12.2025 as flagged. 09.03.2026 Mr. Yousuf Khalid advocate for petitioner Syed Hafiz Ibadur-Rehman advocate for SECP................ The Petitioners have filed the instant Petition under Section 279 to 283 of the Companies Act, 2017, seeking inter-alia sanction of a Scheme of Arrangement. Under Section 279, 281, 282, 283 and 285 of the Companies Act, 2017, all formalities have been fulfilled. The Scheme of Arrangement sought is available at Page-695 onwards, Annexure “C” of the File. The relevant Reports of the respective Petitioners are available on File1, as per Rule 57 of the Companies (Court) Rules, 1997. Advertisement of the main Petition was ordered by this Court on 05.11.2025, and subsequently Publication was carried out in the daily Jang (Urdu) dated 11.11.2025 and Dawn (English) dated 10.11.2025. Publication was also issued to be printed in the Official Gazette on 26.11.2025. Creditors’ Report has also been filed with the Chairman’s Report2. Chairman’s Report relating to Notice of Meeting of the Members of Petitioners No.1 & 2 held in compliance of the orders of this Court is also on record. Learned counsel submits that all legal formalities and compliance have been concluded, and therefore, there does not remain any serious objection regarding the Scheme of Arrangement to be allowed.

Chairman’s Report relating to Notice of Meeting of the Members of Petitioners No.1 & 2 held in compliance of the orders of this Court is also on record. Learned counsel submits that all legal formalities and compliance have been concluded, and therefore, there does not remain any serious objection regarding the Scheme of Arrangement to be allowed. The SECP is represented by Syed Hafiz Ebad-ur-Rehman, who submits that all codal formalities and legal requirements have been fulfilled, and there remains no 1 Available at Pages-3, 97, 177, 673 of the file 2 Available at Page-177, 673 of the file - { 2 } - impediment to grant of this Petition. Considering that no objection has been received against this Petition, nor is there any material on record to suggest that same is contrary to law or in violation of any public interest, accordingly, the instant Petition is allowed as prayed, and the Scheme of Arrangement is hereby permitted subject to fulfillment of all legal requirements and formalities. Petition allowed. Judge IK
